title: Cannabis projects tongues through mind, space, and time axes

citations.meaning: Grounded awareness / consciousness of material presence (Lotus seen through Mind — the felt sense of being here, embodied, in a specific moment of earth)
Grounded locality / the spatial fact of material presence (Lotus through Space — where something is in the most concrete sense, its place in the earth)
Grounded duration / the temporal weight of material existence (Lotus through Time — how long something has been here, its age as felt reality)
Conscious persistence / the act of mind making something durable
Conscious spatial action / the act of mind deliberately occupying or shaping space
Conscious temporal action / the act of mind deliberately moving through or shaping time

authoritative_claims: Cannabis acts as a tongue-through-axis semantic pedagogy layer.
Axis and tongue projection must remain explicit rather than flattened into ordinary glossing.
forbidden_english: Treating Cannabis tokens as unrelated vocabulary items with no axis semantics
